Summary: Core Flow Integrity and Admin Safety
Description: Harden policy enforcement, idempotency, session resilience, and auditability for player and admin critical paths.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic complete when Sprint 1 child stories are done, production smoke is green, and no P1 defects remain in assignment or captain flow.

Description: Deliver incident mode, fallback behavior, operational dashboard, and rehearsal readiness before event day.
Acceptance Criteria: Epic complete when Sprint 2 child stories are done, rehearsal passes, and rollback drill is validated.

Description: Create a single policy matrix for PENDING, RUNNING, PAUSED, ENDED and enforce it across gameplay and admin mutation endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: All guarded endpoints return expected status and error codes by state; policy tests cover each state/action pair; OpenAPI reflects restrictions.

Summary: Add idempotency to admin mutating endpoints
Description: Require x-idempotency-key for critical admin mutations including assignment, captain update, clue reopen, deduction, and status changes.
Acceptance Criteria: Retrying same key and payload returns the original result with no duplicate mutation; mismatched payload with same key returns 409.

Description: Add captain handoff endpoint and UI flow with reason, confirmation, and force override controls when RUNNING.
Acceptance Criteria: Captain handoff is blocked in RUNNING without force override; successful handoff records reason and actor in audit log; UI displays clear success and block states.

Summary: Add session resilience after backend restart
Description: Implement transparent admin re-auth and player session resume prompts after restart or token invalidation.
Acceptance Criteria: Admin can continue setup flow after restart with one action; player sees resume prompt and can recover without data loss; e2e covers restart scenario.

Description: Enforce canonical name normalization and duplicate detection using case-insensitive and whitespace-insensitive matching.
Acceptance Criteria: Attempts to join or assign duplicates are rejected with deterministic error messages; tests cover mixed-case and whitespace variants.

Description: Expand audit metadata with actor, reason, before state, after state, and force override markers.
Acceptance Criteria: All admin mutations write enriched audit entries; audit endpoint returns complete fields; admin UI can filter by action and team.

Summary: Admin setup preflight and destructive confirmation UX
Description: Add preflight checklist before Start Test Hunt and typed confirmation for destructive actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Start Test Hunt disabled until preflight is complete; destructive actions require typed confirmation; e2e verifies blocked and allowed states.

Summary: Edge-case integration and e2e coverage expansion
Description: Add tests for race conditions, RUNNING captain rules, stale UI submissions, and restart recovery.
Acceptance Criteria: Backend and admin e2e suites include new edge cases; CI is green on main for three consecutive runs.

Summary: Production alert baseline for critical failures
Description: Configure alerts for 5xx spikes, rate-limit spikes, review backlog age, and restart loops.
Acceptance Criteria: Alert rules are active in production; test alert triggers route to configured channel; runbook includes ack and escalation steps.

Description: Deploy sprint scope and run smoke plus targeted policy verification against production.
Acceptance Criteria: Deployment is successful for backend and web; smoke script passes; policy checks confirm RUNNING and force override behavior.

Description: Implement NORMAL, DEGRADED, HARD_PAUSE with centralized enforcement across mutating gameplay/admin endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: HARD_PAUSE blocks mutating actions with deterministic 423 response; read endpoints remain available; mode changes are audited.

Summary: Build incident mode controls in admin UI
Description: Add visible incident banner, reason capture, and one-click mode switching in Live Ops.
Acceptance Criteria: Mode updates reflect in UI within 5 seconds; reason is required for HARD_PAUSE; banner shows active mode and timestamp.

Description: When socket health drops, auto-fallback to polling for key views and show operator/player status indicators.
Acceptance Criteria: When websocket disconnect is sustained, polling starts automatically; no duplicate updates; UI indicates degraded realtime mode.

Description: Detect stale admin writes using version tokens and show conflict resolution prompts.
Acceptance Criteria: Conflicting writes return 409 with latest version; admin UI prompts refresh and retry; tests cover simultaneous edits.

Summary: Add undo window for reversible admin actions
Description: Enable short undo for reversible actions such as assignment remove and deduction with clear expiry.
Acceptance Criteria: Undo is available for configured actions within time window; after expiry action is final; audit tracks original and undo events.

Summary: Ops dashboard for live risk indicators
Description: Create admin dashboard with queue age, auth failures, reconnect rate, and p95 response latency.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard loads in under 500ms under normal load; metrics update every poll interval; thresholds visually highlight risk.

Description: Add synthetic scripts for join, captain action, admin mutation, and incident mode toggle flows.
Acceptance Criteria: Scheduled checks run successfully and alert on failure; scripts are documented and runnable locally.

Description: Run full rehearsal from startup through incident handling and capture findings with owners and due dates.
Acceptance Criteria: Rehearsal completes in under 60 minutes; findings log is published; no open P1 findings remain after remediation.

Description: Enforce release freeze window, verify rollback commands, and snapshot known-good versions.
Acceptance Criteria: Freeze starts on schedule; rollback to last good backend and web version is verified; go/no-go signoff recorded.
